exceptions.reason: XXE in iText's XML parsers, reachable only when iText parses untrusted XML/XFA/PDF. Reachability assessment (docs/security/itext-cve-2017-9096-assessment.md) confirms both usage surfaces — PdfUtil font registration and TextPlainFormatHandler text/CSV-to-PDF — only WRITE PDFs and never parse user-supplied XML, so the flaw is not reachable. No fixed release exists in the com.lowagie:itext 2.x lineage (transitive via the opensagres XDocReport PDF converters).
exceptions.compensating_control: Not reachable from user input (write-only PDF generation, no XML parsing); see docs/security/itext-cve-2017-9096-assessment.md
